heading: Your travel profile.
desc: A summary of your identity, preferences, and trip history.
snapshotSubDesc: A fast summary of who you are, how you travel, and what usually matters when you book.
verifiedNote: Government ID is marked as verified for host trust and smoother check-ins.
verifyNote: Verify your government ID to improve host trust before booking.
trustDesc: These badges, labels, and notes shape the first impression hosts see before they even open a chat thread.
addBio: Add one on your profile page.
trustDesc: What hosts and other guests see about you before they open a conversation.
savedDefaultsDesc: These choices can prefill checkout and host preferences.
addressesDesc: Useful for prefilled billing, traveler details, and upcoming trip planning.
emergencyDesc: Used by booking and safety flows when an emergency contact is needed.
govIdNote: Government ID and traveler verification can be added from your profile settings.

edit.title: Edit your traveler profile.
edit.desc: Update your name, email, phone, and travel details.
edit.sectionTitle: Edit the story travelers and hosts see
edit.sectionDesc: Your preferred name, travel style, and bio are shown to hosts and other travellers.
edit.unsaved: Changes are not saved until you click below.
edit.fieldTravelStyleHint: A short line about how you travel
edit.fieldBioHint: Tell hosts what usually matters most before you arrive
edit.saveError: Could not save profile. Please try again.
edit.authError: User account not found. Please sign in again.
edit.photoUploadError: Photo upload failed. Please try again.

security.title: Sign-in and device security.
security.desc: Connected providers, account security status, and your active session.
security.connectedDesc: Your active sign-in method and available social providers.
security.postureDesc: Security signals derived from your account and sign-in provider.
security.sessionDesc: You are signed in on this device. Full session history will be available when session management launches.
security.recoveryDesc: Your account is tied to your {{provider}} provider. If you ever lose access, use the provider's own account recovery flow to regain entry to Travolish.
security.riskNote: No unusual sign-in activity or unresolved account alerts detected.
security.emailAddressDesc: Used for booking confirmations, host messages, and account security alerts.
security.memberSinceDesc: Account standing and booking history contribute to your traveler trust score.

payments.title: Wallet and payment methods.
payments.desc: Saved cards, billing readiness, and security reassurance.
payments.walletDesc: Primary card is highlighted; backups are easy to scan.
payments.tokenizedDesc: Card details are masked in transit. This layout is compatible with masked backend responses.
payments.walletNote: Gift cards, travel credits, and future wallet instruments can stack into this same area.
payments.billingDesc: Integration target for add-card and update-card endpoints.
payments.savedError: Could not save. Please try again.
payments.cardError: Could not add card. Please try again.

transactions.title: Payments, refunds, and receipts.
transactions.summaryDesc: A quick ledger overview so you can understand spend and credits without scrolling through every row.
transactions.ledgerDesc: All your booking transactions in one place.
transactions.receiptError: Receipt not available for this booking.
